review_title: Great AI chatbot for complex products and real use cases
description: Overall, our experience with Zipchat has been very positive. We use it to help customers navigate a complex product assortment and answer repetitive questions without overloading our support team. The chatbot improves the customer experience while saving time internally, and the flexibility of the tool makes it suitable even for more demanding use cases.
author: Tomáš P.
pros: The level of control and customization. Being able to fully prompt the chatbot, adjust answers, and fine-tune its behavior directly in the admin is the biggest advantage. It allows us to keep the chat aligned with our brand voice and real product expertise, which is essential in a professional e-commerce environment. Zipchat is good value for money, flexible setup, and very solid performance for an AI chat tool. The product is easy to integrate into the website, works reliably, and gives us much more control than most competing solutions. Customer support has been responsive and helpful when needed.
cons: It’s not a “set it and forget it” tool if you want the best results, but that also comes with the benefit of flexibility.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Does exactly what it says it does. We recommend it and will continue our use with probably some additions with our other businesses.
author: AJ V.
pros: Ease of setup and use. Support is quick and helpful. It works like it says it does.
cons: I would have given ZipChat a 5 star, however had a little difficulty reaching someone to signup and get started. Nothing outrageous but did have a little trouble there. And I would like the knowledge base build out a little more with more specific instructions for various use cases.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Bimpe O.
pros: Great customer support and helpful suggestions for workarounds regarding their features. Always a pleasant interaction
cons: not much. I think sometimes their integrations feel quite limited even when trying to use zapier. I also wish they could automate send and had more of workflow functionality.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Feedback on Zipchat: pros, cons, and overall experience
description: Zipchat has truly revolutionized the way we work! It handles customer interactions quickly and accurately, saving a lot of time for the colleague who used to manage the live chat. Now our team can focus on other important tasks and be more productive overall.
author: Mattia D.
pros: I like that it can respond accurately and promptly, and that it is possible to intervene when the response is not what you want or correct. It is also very important that it can send an email to the site owner when Zipchat does not know how to respond. The site's user interface is also excellent.
cons: I find that at the moment there is nothing that doesn't work and that I don't like, as the software is constantly evolving and the support is excellent.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple and Powerful Tool to Boost Conversions and Customer Experience
description: Zipchat has helped us streamline customer communication in a way that feels personal and efficient. It has boosted our recovery of abandoned carts and improved our post-sale experience. On top of that, their support team is responsive and helpful. It’s a tool we’ll continue using and building on.
author: David M.
pros: It’s super easy to set up and integrates seamlessly with our Shopify store. We’ve especially loved the WhatsApp automation features — abandoned cart recovery and post-purchase flows work great. The bot feels natural and has helped us maintain a personal tone with our customers while saving time and increasing conversions.
cons: While the interface is user-friendly, we’ve hit a few limitations when trying to build more complex automations. It would also be helpful to have more advanced customer behavior segmentation options to fine-tune our flows.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very happy with my ZipChat experience, especially after speaking with their CS!
description: Overall, it's been very positive for me. So much so that I want to be a part of it and help this company grow!
author: Joseph L.
pros: It's easy to use, it's easy implement and most of all, it's effective. The backend is quite simple for now, but that's because they've cut out all the irrelevant functions and they're only showing what's most important. Customer service was great also!
cons: Limits to things like # of lines in AI training instructions, pages, replies, etc. but I get it. They have to manage and for the replies, well that's how they generate revenue! (Hopefully this will decrease as they gain more users). Good news is CS can help increase some of it (within reason) if you need it so that's appreciated.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Excellent chatbot from an excellent company
author: Joris A.
pros: Great chat tool, created by a company that strives to make the product more comprehensive and better every day.
cons: In the beginning, there was no option to have a chat taken over by a human, but now that works well too.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: An outstanding app for saving time.
description: Overall, the experience is extremely positive. For a small team managing two e-commerce sites, it’s incredibly useful to save so much time by not having to respond to customers and being able to focus on other tasks. A truly excellent use of AI.
author: Federico F.
pros: Zipchat provides extremely accurate customer service regarding the products on our two websites, offering advice just as we would ourselves and carefully reading all the information. The ability to “teach” the system how to respond is an added value.
cons: In some situations, it tends to get a bit imaginative in its responses, but only when there’s very little information available and only in rare cases. It would be interesting to have an alert system for incoming messages to monitor performance and step in manually when needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Smart, Fast, and Reliable – Great Chatbot for Growing Teams
description: Zipchat has made a noticeable difference in how we interact with site visitors. It’s intuitive to use, and the AI handles most conversations well. I’ve seen an increase in engagement and fewer missed opportunities compared to when we relied only on human agents. While there’s room for improvement—especially around data insights and personalization—the tool is a solid value for small to medium-sized businesses
author: noureddine B.
pros: The AI chatbot responds quickly and intelligently. Easy to set up and customize for my website. Great for engaging visitors and capturing leads automatically. Helpful integrations with CRM tools.
cons: Limited analytics in the basic plan. Some advanced customization requires coding knowledge. Occasionally misunderstands complex queries.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Saved me so much time and money as I was going to build out my own agent but no longer need to after discovering that it literally does everything that I wanted to build right out of the box. Support is great too.
author: Jason M.
pros: Speed and ease of training... less than 15 min and the chat results were remarkable. Updating the knowledge base is super easy. The automations lead to more sales.
cons: Nothing found yet... its over delivering on my expectations. Well, maybe the instructions on getting tracking integrated into my site... too developer focused and not consumer focused.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Esperienza super positiva e [CONTENUTO SENSIBILE] è stato veramente utile nella configurazione e nella spiegazione sull'utilizzo.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Sono molto contento del servizio di chat e con integrazione con whatsapp con intelligenza artificiale è davvero top fantastica!
cons: Davvero tutto fatto bene non saprei dire nessuna nota negativa. Consiglio vivamente questa chat e sono estremamente soddisfatto
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reliable Chatbot With Great Value and Solid Support
description: Zipchat has been a reliable solution for streamlining customer communication. It balances affordability with essential features, making it a strong option for small to mid-sized businesses. While not the most advanced tool in the market, it gets the job done well and is backed by a support team that actually cares.
author: Steven M.
pros: What I liked most about Zipchat is the value for money. It delivers strong chatbot functionality without being overpriced. The interface is easy to use, reports are clear, and the automation saves a lot of manual effort. Customer support has been responsive and helpful whenever I’ve had questions.
cons: The customization options for chat design and advanced reporting could be improved. Some features feel a bit basic compared to higher-end platforms.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: E' un servizio di chatbot eccezionale! La qualità dell'interazione è incredibile: la velocità di risposta e la fluidità delle conversazioni lo rendono uno strumento ideale per chi cerca un supporto rapido e intuitivo. Funziona perfettamente fornendo risposte pertinenti e dettagliate. Anche l'interfaccia è semplice e immediata, ideale per qualsiasi tipo di utente. Consiglierei ZipChat a chiunque cerchi un servizio chatbot affidabile e professionale!
author: Duccio L.
pros: Funziona perfettamente, senza intoppi, e sembra davvero capire le richieste
cons: secondo me le proactive chats dovrebbero avere la possibilità di essere integrate nelle pagine direttamente con uno script
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: AI stupefacente e molto veloce nel rispondere
description: Sicuramente esperienza positiva. Sicuramente un prodotto da consigliare
author: Maurizio G.
pros: Facilità di integrazione nel proprio sito. Le risposte fornite da AI sono sorprendenti e fornite molto velocemente. E' incredibile come risponda in maniera adeguata anche a domande non pertinenti al sito, purtroppo c'è gente che fornisce domande stupide per divertimento
cons: Francamente non ho riscontrato punti negativi del prodotto
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Cesare T.
pros: Ottimo prodotto e servizio, [nascosto contenuto sensibile] è stato sempre disponibile e di aiuto per qualsiasi necessità, consiglio il prodotto..
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: ZipChat x AK Informatica - Un aiuto incredibile
description: Ho trovato il tool come un ottimo strumento integrativo all'ecommerce, semplice da usare e ottimale per il supporto pre-sale.
author: Guido C.
pros: la personalizzazione del prompt è l'opzione che veramente da la svolta. Il limite dei caratteri aiuta ad ottimizzare ulteriormente l'efficienza e la capacità dell'assistente virtuale.
cons: La gestione della knowledge base poco gestibile e difficile da tenere organizzata. Mi piacerebbe in futuro avere più opzioni di personalizzazione e controllo.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very happy with the choice for Zipchat. At first we didn't know if it would make a difference. But it's a real must-have.
author: Sanae S.
pros: It cuts down the amount of emails we were receiving. Some simple questions, can be found on the website, but we still received a lot of e-mails. Now, our e-mails are reduced.
cons: Only missing the option to interfere in the chat with the customer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great! I have great expectations about what they are building.
author: Michael T.
pros: We tried a few apps before finding ZipChat. All of them had a really limited understanding of our business, resulting in embarrassment from me about the kind of replies. Zipchat is able to get the full context and to speak to customers with emphaty
cons: Users can’t checkout in the chatbot. This feature would be really useful
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficient and User-Friendly with Room for Growth
author: Billel T.
pros: appreciate Zipchat's ease of configuration and the ability to add pages to optimize the chatbot experience. It's particularly effective for engaging with my French-speaking audience, which is crucial for my business.
cons: While Zipchat has many strengths, it lacks certain features that could enhance its utility. For instance, the absence of a mobile app to receive instant notifications when a client needs assistance is notable. Additionally, the platform could benefit from an option to allow manual responses immediatly when the chatbot cannot handle specific queries effectively. Lastly, the chatbot button functionality could be improved by adding predefined options for common customer inquiries, such as order tracking or information on new products.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Andrea C.
pros: I tried many ai powered chatbot but this one has the best generative answers when it comes to engaging with customers (
cons: At first I hoped they had the ability to takeover the chat with a live agent and I was kinda disappointed when they told me they didn’t have this feature. [sensitive content hidden] explained me about the AI only focus. Luckily I trusted him and it works perfect.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I can save money not hiring an additional member in my the team
author: Nicolo M.
pros: Zip chat is a great tool to add to your ecommerce. It gives you the possibility to have an additional member in your team. Therefore, you get a software that is doing the job of one sales man but with a way lower cost. The chat works great and has the ability to generate sales through the AI. I was doubting at first, however I nned to admit that after 6 months of usage I would never remove it from my ecommerce now.
cons: Initially the price, however if you compare to have someone h24 there to chat, makes a lot of sense.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Lisa D.
pros: Zipchat chat bot was so easy to install and customize. More importantly, it took over an important role in servicing my customers, so it was one less thing for me to worry about. Highly recommend.
cons: Nothing. I have no complaints about this product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Andrea B.
pros: La coerenza e la precisione delle risposte a supporto del cliente.
cons: Forse l’unica cosa il font delle risposte. Una banalità
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great, easy to set up. Have already recommended it to several of my mates
author: Stephen S.
pros: - easy of use - can see the conversion rate and track conversations - can teach the bot using corrections
cons: - It sometimes uses the exact same response twice when the customer is looking for a different answer - It can be obvious that you're speaking to a bot at times
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mathilde P.
pros: Very easy to setup and run. Very helpfull for lot of customers requests.
cons: A few bugs at first, but quickly resolved
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
